entity.summary: Spain-based open-source decentralized peer-to-peer Bitcoin exchange project launched across more than 70 countries on July 21, 2015. Later project and company references no longer show active exchange development or operation, so HEI retains inactive status without assigning an unsupported terminal date.
entity.notes: Coinffeine is treated as an entity-level DEX / P2P exchange record rather than a conventional AMM. Contemporary reporting strongly supports the 2015-07-21 launch, while later references describe the project and company in past or inactive terms. No clean official shutdown announcement or exact terminal date has been found, so inactive is retained instead of dead.

expected.summary: Spain-based open-source decentralized peer-to-peer Bitcoin exchange project. Coinffeine publicly launched in July 2015 across more than 70 countries, but later references describe the project as having ceased active development and operations around 2016-2017. HEI models it as inactive because a definitive shutdown announcement or terminal date is not established.
expected.notes: HEI treats Coinffeine as an entity-level DEX / P2P exchange record. It is kept inactive rather than dead because launch and project history are well supported, but the terminal status is based on secondary profile references rather than a clean official shutdown notice.

Contemporary reporting strongly supports the 2015-07-21 launch, while later references describe the project and company in past or inactive terms. No clean official shutdown announcement or exact terminal date has been found, so inactive is retained instead of dead.

evidence.title: Coinffeine Launches P2P Bitcoin Exchange in Over 70 Countries
evidence.notes: Contemporary launch coverage establishing July 21, 2015 and the more-than-70-country rollout.

evidence.title: Coinffeine historical profile
evidence.notes: Historical profile describes Coinffeine in past tense as the company and project that created a distributed Bitcoin-fiat exchange.

evidence.title: COINFFEINE SL company profile
evidence.notes: Spanish company-data profile lists Coinffeine SL as inactive, supporting inactive rather than active platform handling without establishing an exchange shutdown date.
